# flashblade_file_system_export (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade file system export by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_file_system_export" "example" {
  name = "existing-fs/export"
}

output "file_system_export_enabled" {
  value = data.flashblade_file_system_export.example.enabled
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The combined name of the export to look up (e.g. 'filesystem/export_name').

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the export is enabled.
- `export_name` (String) The export name part.
- `file_system_name` (String) The name of the file system being exported.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the file system export.
- `policy_type` (String) The policy type ('nfs' or 'smb').
- `server_name` (String) The name of the server the file system is exported to.
- `share_policy_name` (String) The name of the SMB share policy applied to the export.
- `status` (String) The status of the export.
